title: gothofreda paupercula
intro: Gothofreda paupercula, also known as the "poor Gothofreda", is a flowering plant species in the family Rubiaceae. It is used for its medicinal properties, particularly its leaves, which are employed to treat various health issues. Gothofreda paupercula is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever and inflammation, and it is also used as an antiseptic to treat wounds and infections. The herbal preparations of Gothofreda paupercula include infusion and decoction, where the dried leaves are steeped in hot water to make a tea that can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
